The following events took place in '''110 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Batorine]] joins the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Many [[Blood Carver]]s relocate to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="EGAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
*[[Riboga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] establishes a [[Crime lord/Legends|criminal]] [[organization]].<ref>The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' mentions that Riboga established his organization 78 years before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. It can therefore Riboga founded his organization in 110 BBY.</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' {{Imo}}
